name: Gipuzkoan Basque (Gipuzkera)
notes: Gipuzkoan (Gipuzkera). Central Basque dialect, closest to Euskara Batua standard. Full three-way sibilant contrast maintained (apical/laminal/postalveolar). Palatal stops [c, ɟ] well preserved. Primary reference variety for standardization.

sources.author: Hualde, J.I. & Ortiz de Urbina, J. (eds.)
sources.title: A Grammar of Basque

sources.author: Ladefoged, P. & Maddieson, I.
sources.title: The Sounds of the World's Languages
